name: North Carolina Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients together.
2. Add egg, buttermilk, and water to the dry mixture.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into hot deep fat.
4. Fry until golden brown. (If a deep pot is used, the hushpuppy will float to the top when done).
5. If you don't want to buy buttermilk, substitute 1/2 cup milk with 1 tablespoon lemon juice added. Stir and let it sit for 5 minutes before using.
Please note: Variations of this recipe can include adding finely chopped onion or adjusting sugar levels. However, at the coast of North Carolina, the above type recipe is typically served.
